rationale: The citing paper focuses on experimental tests of combinatory recommendations as an expertise signal (perceived depth, product attitudes, Instagram ad A/B outcomes), whereas the cited paper is an agent-based diffusion/customer-equity decomposition of word-of-mouth seeding (expansion vs. acceleration). This construct and method mismatch suggests the citation is likely background context on WOM/seeding rather than a direct theoretical or methodological dependency. The matched evidence is only a bare DOI reference with no contextual text indicating substantive use.
